overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city environment, beginning in a neon-lit covered pedestrian arcade, crossing a busy intersection with futuristic vehicles, walking under an elevated highway structure, and ending at a street-side diner counter. The footage features high-quality game engine rendering with vibrant neon signage and detailed urban architecture characteristic of games like Cyberpunk 2077.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered pedestrian walkway lined with vibrant neon advertisements including a prominent CIRRUS COLA overhead sign. The camera follows a child in a green shirt walking ahead, passing other pedestrians and modern glass buildings on the right side.

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens into a sunlit urban street with a pedestrian bridge visible ahead. The camera continues forward past modern glass buildings now on the left, with moderate traffic of futuristic vehicles visible on the right.

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the wide sunlit intersection, navigating between moving futuristic vehicles and other pedestrians. Crosswalk markings cover the ground while the pedestrian bridge looms closer ahead, and traffic signals mark the corners of the crossing.

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the massive elevated highway structure, the environment becomes darker and more industrial with concrete support beams lining the left side. Traffic continues to flow on the right while the camera approaches a diner sign visible ahead, passing pedestrians coming from the opposite direction.

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters the CIRRUS diner's outdoor dining area beneath the elevated highway, featuring tiled flooring, potted plants, and metal tables. The camera approaches the service counter where a vendor waits, passing a seated customer, with neon lighting illuminating the ordering area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant, neon-lit pedestrian arcade into the industrial shadows of a city underpass. It begins within a covered walkway beneath a glowing Cirrus Cola sign, following a child in a green shirt past glass buildings and other pedestrians. As the camera exits the arcade, the scene opens into a bright, sunlit urban street where the perspective shifts past modern architecture toward a wide intersection filled with futuristic vehicles. The camera then crosses the sunlit pavement and moves beneath a massive elevated highway, where the lighting dims and the environment becomes more industrial among concrete support beams. Finally, the path leads into the outdoor dining area of the Cirrus diner, passing potted plants and metal tables before arriving at the neon-lit service counter.
